- run_id: fixture-post-repair-verification
- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.mode: resume
- lineage.is_resumed_run: True
- lineage.source_run_id: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.source_checkpoint: completed
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: post-repair-verification
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source repair rerun nginx test already passed
[doctor] lineage 摘要
- 这是一轮 resumed run：当前运行继承自 fixture-legacy-fallback（source checkpoint: completed）。
- 源运行本身不是已记录的 resumed run，当前链路到此为止。
- 当前 resume 策略：post-repair-verification。
- 触发原因：source repair rerun nginx test already passed。
- 当前已解析到 2 段 lineage 链。
- 操作建议：优先查看 repair 结果与 nginx test 相关输出，确认是否还需要人工处理。
- 当前策略优先产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-repair-verification/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：当前 run 已产出 repair 复查结果；在 post-repair-verification 下应先看这一份。
- 最近的异常祖先节点：fixture-legacy-fallback （repair=needs-attention）。
- 祖先参考产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-legacy-fallback/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。
[doctor] lineage chain
- depth: 2
- 1. [current] fixture-post-repair-verification (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=post-repair-verification; reason=source repair rerun nginx test passed)
- 2. [ancestor-1] fixture-legacy-fallback (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=fresh; reason=new-run; alerts=repair=needs-attention)

- apply_execute: skipped
- repair: ok
- rollback:
- final: success
[doctor] apply result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-post-repair-verification/APPLY-RESULT.json
- mode: execute
- final_status: needs-attention
- nginx_test.requested: True
- nginx_test.status: failed
- recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- recovery.resume_strategy: repair-review-first
- recovery.resume_recommended: False
- recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- next_step: 真实 apply 已落盘，但 nginx 测试失败；建议先运行 repair helper 做保守诊断。

- mode: execute

- source_recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- source_recovery.resume_recommended: False
- source_recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- execution.nginx_test_rerun_status: passed

- final_status: ok
- flags.execute: False
- next_step: 当前场景以 repair verification 为主；rollback companion 仅用于保持结果契约集合完整。
